/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.2 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o /Users/lilithgames/Desktop/workspace/cmake/project_lib_use/bin/app   -L/Users/lilithgames/Desktop/workspace/cmake/project_lib_use/lib1  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/lilithgames/Desktop/workspace/cmake/project_lib_use/lib1 -lprog
